body.title: Engram tool: scan recent turns for confabulation tell-phrase signatures
body.result: ConfabScanner with capability/self/fact detection. 19 tests covering both real 2026-04-23 cases (897ad9c0, fb274171). CLI entrypoint for standalone use. 965037d0.
body.description:
Build CC-side scanner that reads last N turns and classifies confabulation tells by subtype: capability ('I can't access X from Y', 'I don't have direct access'), fact (temporal drift, wrong dates/versions), self ('I'm in the web channel', 'I'm just an LLM'). Returns matching turns with subtype + confidence + tell-phrase matched.

**Affected files:** new lab/claudecode/engram_tools/confab_scanner.py, tests/test_confab_scanner.py
**Design rules:** docs-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not
**Scope boundary:** IN — regex/keyword classification on turn_trace text, three-subtype taxonomy. OUT — auto-remediation, auto-deposit of grounding engrams (that's T-deposit-grounding-engram territory).
**Test plan:** unit tests: canned turn outputs for all three subtypes + clean baseline; verify 897ad9c0 ('web channel' tell) → capability subtype; verify fb274171 ('no direct access' + 'April 2025' date drift) → capability + fact subtypes.
